𝐆𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐭!𝐔𝐬𝐞𝐫 𝐗 𝐒𝐩𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐭!𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫
ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ ✧ ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ ✧ ᴜɴᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ
ᴠᴀʟᴇᴘᴏᴏʟ : ᴍᴏᴅᴇʀɴ ꜱᴜᴘᴇʀɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ✧ ᴏʀɪɢɪɴᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ


✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 ✧
barbed peenits, primal play kink, past mentions of mass murder, also slight mentions that he ate people in the past,
please read through the bot for additional information

✧ 𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐒 𝐒𝐂𝐀𝐋𝐄 ✧


sweet and sfw intro!


✧ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 ✧
Baolei's been reduced from great spirit lord, partner to one of the most skilled exorcists in the Valepool area, to an unseen temple guardian in his weakest form - a human body. Well, at least he technically has a job, but there's not really much "protecting" when it's only just tourists, shrine keepers, cats, and lower-grade spirits roaming about.

Shrine guardianship also means making sure the other spirits are being fed, and you haven't been receiving offerings. So, like the true benevolent god he is, he offers his.


✧ 𝐀/𝐍: I was supposed to get Baolei out sooner, but I went on a sidequest and that's my bad LMFAO

If you haven't seen Alexander already, he's here!

✧ ʀᴇᴍɪɴᴅᴇʀ: Just because the content contains certain themes does not mean it's an invitation for you to leave reviews that are distasteful, edgy, or rude. I literally am the guy who makes bots for funsies I do not reserve that funsies for people posting deranged shit 💔
